rationale: Clear, well-organized explainer that answers both how heat pumps work and why a homeowner might choose one. It uses strong specifics (efficiency ranges, cold-weather performance, trade-off on upfront cost) and flows logically. Slightly more polished/technical than plainspoken in spots, with terms like refrigerant and carbon-neutral, and it runs a bit long for a very short explainer.
